recommendations.title: The Lost Husband
recommendations.overview: Trying to put her life back together after the death of her husband, Libby and her children move to her estranged Aunt's goat farm in central Texas.

recommendations.title: Holiday Rush
recommendations.overview: After his sudden firing, a popular radio DJ moves in with his aunt, bringing along his four spoiled children, and a plan to return to the airwaves.

recommendations.title: California Suite
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of four groups of guests at the Beverly Hills Hotel.

recommendations.title: Tallulah
recommendations.overview: Desperate to be rid of her toddler, a dissatisfied Beverly Hills housewife hires a stranger to babysit and ends up getting much more than she bargained for.

recommendations.title: The Firefly
recommendations.overview: After her estranged brother's sudden death, young wife Lucia bonds with his fiancée through their shared grief and finds herself falling in love.

recommendations.title: Slums of Beverly Hills
recommendations.overview: In 1976, a lower-middle-class teenager struggles to cope living with her neurotic family of nomads on the outskirts of Beverly Hills.

recommendations.title: Lowriders
recommendations.overview: A young street artist in East Los Angeles is caught between his father's obsession with lowrider car culture, his ex-felon brother and his need for self-expression.

recommendations.title: Home Again
recommendations.overview: Life for a single mom in Los Angeles takes an unexpected turn when she allows three young guys to move in with her.

recommendations.title: Beverly Hills Cop: Axel F
recommendations.overview: Forty years after his unforgettable first case in Beverly Hills, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to do what he does best: solve crimes and cause chaos.

recommendations.title: His Three Daughters
recommendations.overview: Emotions run high when three estranged sisters reunite in a cramped New York City apartment to watch over their ailing father during his final days.
